student_name: Ana Paula Porto de Oliveira Fornazari
hub_subtitle: Inglês do dia a dia — apresentar-se, rotina e conversação

lesson.menu_desc: Talking about how long you have done things, with the present perfect and for / since -- your first year settling into a new life -- 35 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 13 -- How Long? Settling In
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Ana Paula Porto de Oliveira Fornazari | Lesson 13 -- How Long? Settling In
lesson.grammar_point: present perfect with for and since for duration

listenings.text: I moved to this city about five years ago, and honestly, it has been quite a journey. For the first few months, I felt a little homesick, and everything was new and confusing. But gradually, I got used to the rhythm of the place. I have lived in the same apartment since my second year here, and I really love it. I have worked at the same hospital for four years now, and I have made good friends ever since I joined a local running club. So far, this city has given me everything I hoped for. It took a while, but now I truly feel like I belong.

Hi Ana Paula, it is Sofia! I just wanted to check in and see how you are settling in. I still remember when I moved abroad. For the first month, I felt so homesick, and I missed everything about home. But things get better, I promise. Ever since I found a daily routine, life has felt normal again. I have lived in three different countries so far, and each time it takes a while to adapt. Lately, I have been thinking about visiting you. How long have you been in Florida now? Is it three months already? Time flies! Call me back, and tell me everything. Bye!

extra_audio.text: I moved to Florida in the spring, and at first everything felt strange. For the first few weeks, I was a little homesick. Then, gradually, I started to settle in. Ever since I met my neighbors, I have felt more at home. So far, it has been the best decision of my life.
